featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Journal entries management
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can create, edit, and delete journal entries with content.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Daily mood logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can log their mood daily with tracking capabilities.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Timeline view
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can view a timeline of their entries and mood logs combined.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: AI insights generation
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: AI generates reflections and insights from user data (paid feature).

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Search functionality
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can search through their entries and tags.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Dashboard overview
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users see an overview of their journaling and mood data.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Analytics insights
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can view analytics and insights about their mood and journaling patterns.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User settings management
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can manage their account settings and preferences.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User authentication system
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can sign up, log in, and manage their accounts.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Usage limits enforcement
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Free users are limited to 5 entries per day and 3 mood logs per day.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Stripe payment integration
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can pay for AI features through Stripe.

apiEndpointsToBuild.description: Create a new journal entry with content
Generate AI insights from user data

openQuestions: What specific mood values or scale should be used for mood logging?
How should tags be implemented for entries and search?
What specific AI insights should be generated and how should they be formatted?
What analytics should be shown on the analytics page?
What user settings should be available on the settings page?
How should the daily limits be enforced (per calendar day, rolling 24 hours)?
What should be the pricing model and subscription tiers for AI features?
